__inputs.name: DS_BIGQUERY
__inputs.label: BigQuery
__inputs.description: Google BigQuery datasource for Solana analytics

panels.title: Total 24h Fees
panels.description: Sum of trailing 24h LP fees across selected DEXs at the latest snapshot.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT SUM(trailing_24h_fees_usd) AS total_24h_fees
FROM `${project}.solana_marts.fct_pool_trailing_24h`
WHERE snapshot_date = (SELECT MAX(snapshot_date) FROM `${project}.solana_marts.fct_pool_trailing_24h`)
  AND dex_name IN (${dex_name:singlequote})

panels.title: Total 24h Volume
panels.description: Sum of trailing 24h pool volume at the latest snapshot.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT SUM(trailing_24h_volume_usd) AS total_24h_volume
FROM `${project}.solana_marts.fct_pool_trailing_24h`
WHERE snapshot_date = (SELECT MAX(snapshot_date) FROM `${project}.solana_marts.fct_pool_trailing_24h`)
  AND dex_name IN (${dex_name:singlequote})

panels.title: Total TVL
panels.description: Total value locked across selected DEXs at the latest snapshot.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT SUM(tvl_usd) AS total_tvl
FROM `${project}.solana_marts.fct_pool_trailing_24h`
WHERE snapshot_date = (SELECT MAX(snapshot_date) FROM `${project}.solana_marts.fct_pool_trailing_24h`)
  AND dex_name IN (${dex_name:singlequote})

panels.title: Active Pools
panels.description: Distinct pools with activity at the latest snapshot.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT pool_address) AS active_pools
FROM `${project}.solana_marts.fct_pool_trailing_24h`
WHERE snapshot_date = (SELECT MAX(snapshot_date) FROM `${project}.solana_marts.fct_pool_trailing_24h`)
  AND dex_name IN (${dex_name:singlequote})

panels.title: Top 20 Pools by Fee Revenue
panels.description: Pools generating the most fees over the selected window — where LP returns concentrate.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  CONCAT(COALESCE(base_token_symbol,'?'),'/',COALESCE(quote_token_symbol,'?'),' · ',dex_name) AS pool,
  SUM(trailing_24h_fees_usd) AS fees_window
FROM `${project}.solana_marts.fct_pool_trailing_24h`
WHERE $__timeFilter(TIMESTAMP(snapshot_date))
  AND dex_name IN (${dex_name:singlequote})
GROUP BY pool
ORDER BY fees_window DESC
LIMIT 20

panels.title: Pool Fee Rate Comparison
panels.description: Fee rate of established pools (filtered by minimum active days).

targets.rawSql:
WITH latest AS (
  SELECT pool_address, base_token_symbol, quote_token_symbol, dex_name, fee_rate_pct,
         ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY pool_address ORDER BY snapshot_date DESC) rn
  FROM `${project}.solana_marts.fct_pool_trailing_24h`
)
SELECT
  CONCAT(COALESCE(l.base_token_symbol,'?'),'/',COALESCE(l.quote_token_symbol,'?'),' · ',l.dex_name) AS pool,
  l.fee_rate_pct
FROM latest l
JOIN `${project}.solana_marts.dim_pool` p USING (pool_address)
WHERE l.rn = 1
  AND p.snapshot_days_count >= ${min_active_days}
ORDER BY l.fee_rate_pct DESC
LIMIT 25

panels.title: Capital Efficiency Leaderboard (Volume / TVL)
panels.description: Highest volume-to-TVL pools — the most capital-efficient places to provide liquidity.

targets.rawSql:
WITH latest AS (
  SELECT pool_address, base_token_symbol, quote_token_symbol, dex_name,
         trailing_24h_volume_usd, tvl_usd, volume_to_tvl_ratio,
         ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY pool_address ORDER BY snapshot_date DESC) rn
  FROM `${project}.solana_marts.fct_pool_trailing_24h`
)
SELECT
  CONCAT(COALESCE(base_token_symbol,'?'),'/',COALESCE(quote_token_symbol,'?')) AS pool,
  dex_name, trailing_24h_volume_usd, tvl_usd, volume_to_tvl_ratio
FROM latest
WHERE rn = 1
  AND dex_name IN (${dex_name:singlequote})
ORDER BY volume_to_tvl_ratio DESC
LIMIT 50

panels.title: Selected Pool — 7-Day Avg Volume Trajectory
panels.description: Pick a pool to see its smoothed volume trend over time.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT snapshot_date AS time, volume_7d_avg
FROM `${project}.solana_marts.fct_pool_trailing_24h`
WHERE $__timeFilter(TIMESTAMP(snapshot_date))
  AND pool_address = '${pool_address}'
ORDER BY snapshot_date

list.name: base_token_symbol
list.label: Base Token
list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT base_token_symbol FROM `${project}.solana_marts.fct_pool_trailing_24h` WHERE base_token_symbol IS NOT NULL

query.rawSql: SELECT DISTINCT base_token_symbol FROM `${project}.solana_marts.fct_pool_trailing_24h` WHERE base_token_symbol IS NOT NULL

list.name: pool_address
list.label: Pool
list.definition: SELECT CONCAT(base_token_symbol,'/',quote_token_symbol,' · ',dex_name) AS __text, pool_address AS __value FROM `${project}.solana_marts.dim_pool` ORDER BY lifetime_observed_volume_usd DESC LIMIT 500

query.rawSql: SELECT CONCAT(base_token_symbol,'/',quote_token_symbol,' · ',dex_name) AS __text, pool_address AS __value FROM `${project}.solana_marts.dim_pool` ORDER BY lifetime_observed_volume_usd DESC LIMIT 500
